name: validation-layer-design
description: Validation layer PoC complete. Approach C (Lazy Memoization) validated with 23 passing tests. Key finding: @ucast/mongo has built-in parse-time validation for type mismatches (e.g., $gt on boolean). Our validation adds schema-aware checks: (1) property existence, (2) operator-type compatibility derived from JSON Schema types, (3) actionable error messages. Two-tier validation: @ucast catches JS type errors at parse, we catch schema-semantic errors post-parse.
relevantCode: OPERATOR_BY_TYPE maps JSON Schema types to valid operators. QueryValidator uses lazy memoization with clearCache() for schema changes. ValidationResult returns {valid, errors[]} with INVALID_PROPERTY and INVALID_OPERATOR codes.
recommendation: ADOPT Approach C (Lazy Memoization). Integrate with real meta-store by replacing MockMetaStore with actual meta-store property lookups. Add clearCache() call on schema reload.
